case_title: PUBLIC STORAGE RENTAL SPACES VS PORTILLO, CARMEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY PUBLIC STORAGE RENTAL SPACES AS TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, CARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTILLO, CARMEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUBLIC STORAGE RENTAL SPACES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTILLO, CARMEN $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,840.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTILLO, CARMEN HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
CONTINUANCE REQUEST OF PLTFF.(ON MOTION TO VACATE HRNG) MANUALLY RESERVED FOR 10/24/94 AT 1:30PM, SENT TO DEPT.6
JUDGMENT IS SET ASIDE. CASE IS TRANSFERRED YO DALY CITY (SAN MATEO CO) PROPERTY IS LOCATED IN DALY CITY.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-17-1994, OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO 116.370 (C (I) CCP AND THE ORDER TRANSFERRING THE CASE TO SAN MATEO COUNTY BE VACATED. ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE
SIGNED ORDER SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
